## Summary

What registry entries are being added or updated?

## Entry Type

- [ ] Application
- [ ] News source
- [ ] Funding source
- [ ] Funding proposal

## Checks

- [ ] This is Handshake-related.
- [ ] Required links are public.
- [ ] DNS and HNS URLs are separated where available.
- [ ] Inclusion is not described as endorsement.
- [ ] Entries that are stale, inactive, disputed, or experimental use neutral labels/notes instead of being removed.
- [ ] Signed metadata is treated as optional/future transparency, not a v0.1 requirement.
- [ ] No private wallet data, secrets, bridge tokens, seeds, keys, or scan output are included.
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
